name: fibonacci-tested
goal: Implement a Python module fib.py that exposes a function fib(n: int) -> int returning the nth Fibonacci number, where fib(0) == 0 and fib(1) == 1. Also write a pytest test file test_fib.py covering at least these cases: fib(0)==0, fib(1)==1, fib(2)==1, fib(10)==55, and a negative-input case (raise ValueError for n<0). Run pytest from the workspace and confirm all tests pass.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 implementation + tests case. Model writes both impl and test. The pytest_pass check is the deterministic gate. The negative-input requirement disambiguates a model that would otherwise pass with a partial impl.
